mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, title, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at FROM COMMUNITY ORDER BY post_id DESC
SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, category, view_count, like_count, status, created_at FROM COMMUNITY WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET status='BANNED', updated_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND status = 'DISPLAY'
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET status='DISPLAY', updated_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id=#{post_id} AND status = 'BANNED'
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET status='HIDDEN', updated_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND status != 'HIDDEN'
